_comment: Copy this file to 'user_options.json' (same folder) to add your own choices. They survive updates. Reload the node or restart ComfyUI to apply.
_comment_fields: 'fields' extends any dropdown EXCEPT gender, hair_color_scope, location_setting, outfit_style and outfit_description.
_comment_outfits: 'outfits' adds whole new outfit_style choices WITH their garment text (the proper way to extend outfit_style). Buckets: unisex (always eligible) plus female/male (picked by the wardrobe control). Any subset is fine; a style with no usable text is skipped.

unisex: a sleek white EVA suit with a mirrored gold visor and magnetic boots
female: a form-fitting flight suit with a utility harness and grav boots
male: a bulky pressurized exosuit with chest controls and a domed helmet

unisex: weathered plate armor over chainmail with a tattered cloak and steel gauntlets

_comment_archetypes: 'archetypes' adds presets to the Archetype node. Same {field: value} shape as the built-ins; outfit_description may use {slot} placeholders (color, fabric, metal, gem, fur, flower, ...). A name matching a built-in overrides it. Run 'python tests/validate_data.py' to check your field values.

Sky Pirate.outfit_description: a {color} longcoat over a leather bodice with brass buckles and tall boots

_comment_cosplayers: 'cosplayers' adds characters to the Cosplayer node. 'costume' (worn items only, no held weapons) is required; 'franchise' and 'gender' (Female/Male, used only for Random scoping) are optional; 'signature' (applied in both modes) and 'physique' (Full character only) are {field: value} maps of valid options. Add gender:Male entries to populate 'Random - male'. Keep text plain ASCII (no em dashes or smart quotes).
_comment_mask: For a fully masked head set 'covers_face': true AND put the head covering in a separate 'mask' string (kept OUT of 'costume'). covers_face hides the randomized face/hair; the mask is appended to the costume by default but kept apart so the node's 'Unmask (show face)' toggle can drop it and reveal the random head. Omit both when the face is visible.

Custom Hero (My OC).costume: a teal-and-silver bodysuit with a star emblem, white gloves, and white boots

Masked Vigilante (My OC).costume: a matte-black armored bodysuit with a hooded cape
Masked Vigilante (My OC).mask: a full black face helmet with narrow glowing eye slits
